card.title: About Dabba & Co.
card.description:
Best-Selling Dishes at Dabba & Co.

Dabba & Co. is a popular food destination in Central Avenue, Nellore, known for serving delicious indian food. Customers can order from Dabba & Co. for fresh preparation, satisfying portions, and flavorful dishes.

Chicken Masala Gravy & Rice Dabba

Chicken Masala Gravy & Rice Dabba is one of the popular dishes at Dabba & Co.. It is prepared with quality ingredients and offers a satisfying taste for customers ordering from Central Avenue.

Rajma Masala Bowl

Rajma Masala Bowl is another preferred item from the menu. It is a good choice for customers looking to enjoy tasty indian food in Nellore.

Why Customers Love Ordering from Dabba & Co.

Customers prefer Dabba & Co. for its tasty food, reliable service, quick preparation, and menu choices. The restaurant serves indian dishes along with options such as soft drinks, making it suitable for different food preferences.

Enjoy Food from Dabba & Co. at Home with Swiggy

Swiggy makes it easy to order food from Dabba & Co. in Nellore. Customers can browse the menu, choose their favorite dishes, place an order online, make secure payments, track the order live, and enjoy doorstep delivery from Dabba & Co. in Central Avenue.

Discover More Restaurants in Central Avenue

Central Avenue has many restaurants offering different cuisines, snacks, meals, desserts, and beverages. Customers exploring food delivery in Nellore can discover more restaurants and order their favorite food online through Swiggy.

qnas.answer: Yes, Dabba & Co. delivers food in Nellore through Swiggy. Customers can order their favorite dishes online and enjoy doorstep delivery.

qnas.answer: Dabba & Co. is known for its indian and popular indian dishes.

qnas.answer: Some of the popular dishes at Dabba & Co. include Chicken Masala Gravy & Rice Dabba, Rajma Masala Bowl, Pindi Chole & Roti Dabba, and Paneer Tikka Masala & Roti Dabba.
